head_meta_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
seo_og_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
seo_twitter_description: Light Brokerage Platform by BeBroker. A simplified premium brokerage setup with fast launch and flexible branding.
hero_heading: Get Your Own Brokerage Brand with $0 Monthly Fee
hero_subtitle: A simplified trading platform designed for a better user experience. Everything you need - nothing you don't.
benefits_title: A premium launch model with less friction
benefits_text: High-conversion brokerage infrastructure focused on speed, clarity, and practical execution.
benefits_markets_text: Forex, Crypto, Stocks, Commodities — curated for maximum trader engagement.
benefits_customizable_text: Your brand, your logo, your domain — fully white-labeled from day one.
benefits_psp_text: Ready-to-use payment service providers — accept deposits from day one with zero setup overhead.
benefits_license_text: We cover the complete legal and regulatory structure for you.
features_text: Give your traders a seamless, top-notch trading experience with a lightweight and modern product architecture.
features_clean_design_text: A lightweight interface designed to reduce user friction and simplify user experience.
features_one_mechanic_text: One trading mechanic: buy and sell in one click. Simple by design.
features_high_conversion_text: Simple interface increases conversion from the first interaction.
features_payments_ready_text: Pre-integrated payment methods for quick deposits.
features_web_instant_text: Works on every device. Give your traders a seamless trading experience both web and mobile.
features_profit_retention_text: Keep the majority of revenue from your traffic.
pricing_text: One transparent entry package with essential setup, legal structure, and core support included.
pricing_highlight_no_fees_text: Flat one-time setup with clear terms
pricing_card_guarantee: Full support during setup. No risk — if we can't deliver, you get a refund.
promo_text: Fill out the form and chat with our managers to discuss your project and see how quickly you can set up your brokerage business.
steps_text: From initial request to live platform in five simple steps.
steps_step1_text: Fill out the form and tell us about your project.
steps_step2_text: Explore the platform and its trading interface.
steps_step3_text: Apply your branding, logo, and domain settings.
steps_step4_text: Finalize terms and complete the agreement.
steps_step5_text: Your platform goes live and is ready for traders.
faq_intro: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our team — we're happy to help.
faq_a1: Typical launches are completed within 7 days for the basic package, with full onboarding support included.
faq_a2: No. The package includes a legal structure option so you can start operating without building a license framework from zero.
faq_a3: Standard integrations include Visa, Mastercard, Crypto, Pix, and Boleto, with additional providers available by request.
faq_q4: Can I use my own branding?
faq_a4: Yes. You can apply your logo, colour direction, and domain from day one. The platform is fully white-labelled.
faq_a5: The platform includes 30+ popular markets — Forex, Crypto, Stocks, and Commodities — and can be expanded based on your strategy.
faq_q6: What's included in the Basic plan?
faq_a6: Web Traderoom, CRM, Back Office, Dealing Desk, Billing, Liquidity, Servers, KYC, Options, Antifraud, SMS, and Affiliate Module — everything you need to operate a brokerage.
faq_a7: No. The Basic plan has a one-time setup fee of $15,000 with $0 monthly charges. You keep 85% of the profit from your traffic.

contact_placeholder_why_launch: e.g. New revenue stream, monetize traffic...

modal_placeholder_why_launch: e.g. New revenue stream, monetize traffic...

modal_success_text: Thank you. Our managers will contact you shortly.

giveaway_head_meta_description: BeBroker Giveaway. Win a ready-to-go light brokerage platform with simplified premium setup, fast launch, and flexible growth infrastructure.
resell_head_title: Keep Top Affiliates In-House With a Sub-Brand | BeBroker
resell_head_meta_description: BeBroker Reseller Offer. Let top affiliates promote a sub-brand that feels like their own while payments, CRM, risk, and revenue stay inside your brokerage.
resell_hero_subtitle: Give proven affiliates a front-end that feels like their own while your brokerage keeps the stack, data, and revenue.
resell_hero_meta_affiliate: Affiliate-facing: Own look, own domain, own funnel
resell_categories_title: Who This Reseller Offer Is For
resell_categories_desc: Built for brokers and networks that want to keep their strongest partners inside the house.
resell_offer_metric_note: Higher retained LTV when affiliates launch a sub-brand under your stack.
resell_offer_text: Selling a sub-brand to proven affiliates increases client lifetime value while payments, CRM, and revenue stay in-house.
resell_category_1_text: Built for brokers already moving meaningful partner traffic.
resell_category_2_text: When simple rev-share is no longer enough to keep the partner close.
resell_category_3_text: Deposits, reporting, and player value stay inside your brokerage.
resell_category_4_text: Ideal for partner brands split by market, region, or traffic channel.
resell_bento_1_title: Stop Losing Strong Partners to External Deals
resell_bento_1_text: Give high-performing affiliates something that feels like ownership without sending them to another broker.
resell_bento_2_text: Every sub-brand runs on the same operational core, so you do not duplicate the most sensitive parts of the business.
resell_bento_value_text: Traffic still monetizes inside your brokerage instead of being handed to a third party.
resell_bento_brand_business:
The affiliate gets a brand.
You keep the business.
resell_bento_dashboard_title: See every sub-brand from one dashboard
resell_bento_dashboard_text: Track traffic quality, conversion, FTDs, and player value across all partner brands.
resell_bento_wrappers_text: Launch differentiated funnels, onboarding, and promos without spinning up a separate brokerage backend.
resell_bento_launch_text: Repeat the model for new GEOs, affiliates, or acquisition channels once the first one works.
resell_features_title: Built on One Centralized Brokerage Stack
resell_features_text: Offer affiliate-facing sub-brands while keeping the operational core unified, controllable, and profitable.
resell_feature_1_text: Custom domains, visuals, promos, and messaging for each partner-facing brand.
resell_feature_2_text: Every sub-brand runs on the same product logic, execution flow, and operational engine.
resell_feature_3_text: Tailor onboarding, offers, and messaging by GEO, affiliate, or acquisition source.
resell_feature_4_text: Keep deposits, withdrawals, and cashier logic centralized across every brand front.
resell_feature_5_text: KYC, CRM, cashier, risk, and reporting stay centralized.
resell_feature_6_text: Create distinct acquisition fronts for a super affiliate, a GEO, or a channel while fulfillment stays on the same engine.
resell_steps_text: Four steps to keep a top affiliate inside your ecosystem.
resell_faq_intro: Need to sanity-check whether a sub-brand model fits your affiliate structure? We can walk you through it.
resell_faq_1_q: Who is this reseller offer for?
resell_faq_1_a: Brokers, networks, and operators with affiliates who want more ownership than a standard rev-share link can offer.
resell_faq_2_q: What does the affiliate actually get?
resell_faq_2_a: A dedicated brand wrapper with its own positioning, creative, landing flow, and optionally its own domain.
resell_faq_3_a: Cashier, KYC, CRM, risk settings, compliance logic, reporting, and overall commercial visibility remain centralized.
resell_faq_4_q: Is this the same as a full white-label brokerage?
resell_faq_4_a: No. A reseller sub-brand gives the affiliate a differentiated front-end without duplicating the entire brokerage stack.
resell_faq_5_q: Can each sub-brand use its own domain and creative?
resell_faq_5_a: Yes. That is one of the main benefits: the partner can have a distinct market-facing identity while the back-office stays unified.
resell_faq_6_q: Do I need separate payments or risk teams for each brand?
resell_faq_6_a: No. The goal is to keep those functions centralized while only the partner-facing layer changes.
resell_faq_7_q: How quickly can a reseller setup go live?
resell_faq_7_a: Launch timing depends on branding scope and operational requirements, but it is designed to move much faster than building a separate brokerage operation.
resell_faq_8_q: Can I run more than one sub-brand at once?
resell_faq_8_a: Yes. The model works well for separate GEOs, traffic sources, and high-value affiliates that need a more tailored funnel.
resell_faq_9_q: Why is this better than sending affiliates to an outside broker?
resell_faq_9_a: Because you keep player data, deposits, reporting visibility, and long-term revenue inside your own brokerage ecosystem.
resell_modal_text: Tell us about your affiliate setup and we will show you how a sub-brand model can keep your best partners in-house.
resell_form_terms: I agree to be contacted about the reseller offer and accept the privacy policy and terms.
resell_modal_showcase_title: Let top affiliates promote a brand they can feel is theirs.
resell_modal_showcase_text: You keep the operational core, data, and revenue visibility.
resell_modal_note_title: Best for brokers with strong affiliates
resell_modal_note_text: Ideal when a partner is big enough to deserve a custom front-end, but not a separate brokerage stack.
resell_success_text: Thank you. Our team will review your setup and come back with the best route for a sub-brand rollout.
